description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a predominantly matte black finish accented by metallic gold and red highlights. The body is angular and modern, with a hexagonal-patterned fore-end and a prominent, cylindrical barrel assembly. A pistol grip is integrated into the rear, and a compact, squared-off stock is attached, suggesting a design optimized for maneuverability in close quarters. The top of the receiver includes a visible rail system, likely for mounting optics or accessories, and a gold-colored charging handle is mounted on the side. The muzzle end is reinforced and features a red-tipped barrel, while the overall construction appears solid and utilitarian, suitable for urban tactical scenarios. The shotgun's components, such as the trigger guard, grip, and stock, are clearly defined and ergonomically shaped.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a matte black body, gold and red accents, a pistol grip, and a compact stock, designed for close-quarters use. Features include a rail system, gold charging handle, and a reinforced, red-tipped barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the hexagonal-patterned fore-end, gold charging handle, and compact stock.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the muzzle, red-tipped barrel, and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rail system, gold charging handle, and the angular design of the stock and grip.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the pistol grip, stock, and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical with a reinforced muzzle and red tip, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
